title: PlayerKnowledgeMask
description: Per-player knowledge mask and reveal ledger for the Discovery Log. Tracks what each player has learned about each entity type through in-game events. The player-visible bestiary entry is computed as: render(canonical_entry, replay(ledger, display_policy)). Lens-tier runtime state.

PlayerKnowledgeMask.title: PlayerKnowledgeMask
PlayerKnowledgeMask.description: Top-level mask structure for a single player. Contains one EntityKnowledgeRecord per entity type the player has any knowledge of.

player_id.description: Player identity. Masks are per-player, never shared or merged.

entity_records.description: Map of entity_type_id → EntityKnowledgeRecord. Only entities with at least one knowledge event appear here.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent ledger event across all entity records.

EntityKnowledgeRecord.title: EntityKnowledgeRecord
EntityKnowledgeRecord.description: Knowledge state for a single entity type, for a single player. Contains the current stage, the set of revealed fields with their reliability, and the full reveal ledger.

entity_type_id.description: References a CanonicalCreatureEntry in the world bundle.

stage.description: Current knowledge stage. Monotonically increasing — never regresses.

stage_history.description: Ordered log of stage transitions with triggering event references.

revealed_fields.description: Map of field_name → RevealedFieldState. Contains only fields that have been explicitly revealed by at least one knowledge event.

reveal_ledger.description: Append-only log of all knowledge events for this (player, entity_type) pair. Ordered by timestamp. Never modified or deleted. The current mask state is reproducible by replaying this ledger.

first_knowledge_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the first knowledge event for this entity.

encounter_count.description: Number of distinct encounters with this entity type.

combat_count.description: Number of distinct combat interactions with this entity type.

study_attempts.description: Number of study_action events (both successes and failures).

RevealedFieldState.title: RevealedFieldState
RevealedFieldState.description: Current state of a single revealed field. Tracks the highest reliability source and the provenance label.

field_name.description: Name of the revealed field (matches a field in CanonicalCreatureEntry).

reliability.description: Highest reliability tier from any source that revealed this field.

provenance_label.description: Provenance label for display. Determined by reliability: high→BOX or DERIVED, medium→DERIVED, low→UNCERTAIN.

source_event_refs.description: References to all ledger events that contributed to this field reveal. Ordered chronologically.

first_revealed_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this field was first revealed.

last_updated_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent event affecting this field.

sub_field_reveals.description: For array/object fields (e.g., notable_abilities, observed_attack_forms): tracks which sub-items have been individually revealed. Key is sub-item identifier (e.g., content_id or form_tag), value is RevealedSubFieldState.

RevealedSubFieldState.title: RevealedSubFieldState
RevealedSubFieldState.description: Reveal state for an individual sub-item within an array/object field (e.g., a single ability within notable_abilities).

sub_item_id.description: Identifier of the sub-item (e.g., content_id for abilities, form_tag for attacks).

reliability.description: Reliability tier of the source that revealed this sub-item.

source_event_ref.description: Reference to the ledger event that revealed this sub-item.

observed_description.description: What the player observed (e.g., 'fired a spray of hardened spines in a cone'). Populated from the knowledge event's field_values.

RevealLedgerEntry.title: RevealLedgerEntry
RevealLedgerEntry.description: A single entry in the append-only reveal ledger. Records one knowledge event and its effects on the mask. Ledger entries are never modified or deleted.

ledger_index.description: Sequential index in the ledger. Monotonically increasing.

event_ref.description: Reference to the originating knowledge event in the campaign event log.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the knowledge event.

reliability.description: Reliability tier of this source event.

stage_before.description: Knowledge stage before this event was applied.

stage_after.description: Knowledge stage after this event was applied.

fields_revealed.description: List of field names revealed or updated by this event. Empty array if no new reveals (e.g., failed study).

field_values_snapshot.description: Snapshot of field values as provided by the event. For auditability. Keys are field names, values are the revealed data.

box_event_ref.description: Reference to the originating Box event (skill check, combat resolution). Null for non-Box sources (npc_report, document_source).

source_player_id.description: For party_share events: the player who shared the knowledge. Null for other source types.

source_npc_id.description: For npc_report events: the NPC who provided the information. Null for other source types.

study_result.description: For study_action events: whether the skill check succeeded. Null for other source types.

seed.description: Deterministic seed used for any computed values in this event. Null if not applicable.

StageTransition.title: StageTransition
StageTransition.description: Record of a knowledge stage transition.

event_ref.description: Reference to the ledger entry that triggered the transition.

description: Schema for the per-player knowledge mask and reveal ledger. The mask tracks what each player has learned about each entity type through progressive in-game discovery. The reveal ledger is append-only and enables deterministic replay: same world bundle + same ledger = same visible bestiary entry.
